req.title: Reconciliation report (boundary variant)
req.statement: The system shall produce a daily reconciliation report comparing internal ledger to correspondent bank; non-zero variance shall open an incident. Boundary behaviour at exact min/max thresholds must be tested.
preconditions: system job

doc.reasoning: R-FIN-050 requires testing: (1) zero-variance happy path where no incident is raised, (2) non-zero variance triggering an incident with appropriate severity, (3) boundary values at exact min/max thresholds where the variance transitions from zero to non-zero. EP covers normal operational partitions, BVA covers exact threshold crossings, STC covers the state change from 'no incident' to 'incident opened', DT covers severity mapping, and NEG covers malformed/unauthorized trigger invocations. Five tests are included to satisfy all mandatory heuristics and the minimum three cases.

tests.name: test_reconcile_zero_variance_no_incident
preconditions: Banking API is reachable at BASE_URL
Internal ledger balance equals correspondent bank balance for test account set
EOD cron job is authorized via CRON_API_KEY header
actions: Seed ledger and correspondent bank with identical balances via <seed_balanced_ledger_fixture>
POST /cron/reconcile with valid CRON_API_KEY header
Poll report store until report status is COMPLETE
expected: No incident record created for the reconciliation run ID
trace: R-FIN-050: daily reconciliation report shall be produced
R-FIN-050: non-zero variance shall open an incident (contrapositive: zero variance must NOT open one)
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests
from tests.fixtures import seed_balanced_ledger_fixture, get_report, get_incidents
from tests.config import BASE_URL, CRON_HEADERS

def test_reconcile_zero_variance_no_incident(seed_balanced_ledger_fixture):
    run_id = seed_balanced_ledger_fixture["run_id"]

    resp = requests.post(f"{BASE_URL}/cron/reconcile", headers=CRON_HEADERS,
                         json={"run_id": run_id})
    assert resp.status_code == 200

    report = get_report(run_id, timeout=30)
    assert report["status"] == "COMPLETE"
    assert report["variance"] == 0

    incidents = get_incidents(run_id)
    assert len(incidents) == 0, f"Expected no incidents, got {incidents}"

tests.name: test_reconcile_nonzero_variance_opens_incident
preconditions: Banking API is reachable at BASE_URL
Internal ledger balance is seeded to differ from correspondent bank balance by 500.00
EOD cron job is authorized via CRON_API_KEY header
actions: Seed ledger with a 500.00 surplus versus correspondent bank via <seed_variance_ledger_fixture>
POST /cron/reconcile with valid CRON_API_KEY header
Poll report store until report status is COMPLETE
Retrieve incidents for the run ID
expected: Exactly one incident record created for the run ID
Incident severity maps to expected level per variance amount decision table
trace: R-FIN-050: non-zero variance shall open an incident
R-FIN-050: incident severity based on variance
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests
from tests.fixtures import seed_variance_ledger_fixture, get_report, get_incidents
from tests.config import BASE_URL, CRON_HEADERS, SEVERITY_TABLE

VARIANCE = 500.00

def test_reconcile_nonzero_variance_opens_incident(seed_variance_ledger_fixture):
    run_id = seed_variance_ledger_fixture(variance=VARIANCE)["run_id"]

    resp = requests.post(f"{BASE_URL}/cron/reconcile", headers=CRON_HEADERS,
                         json={"run_id": run_id})
    assert resp.status_code == 200

    report = get_report(run_id, timeout=30)
    assert report["status"] == "COMPLETE"
    assert report["variance"] == pytest.approx(VARIANCE)

    incidents = get_incidents(run_id)
    assert len(incidents) == 1
    expected_severity = SEVERITY_TABLE.resolve(VARIANCE)
    assert incidents[0]["severity"] == expected_severity

tests.name: test_reconcile_boundary_minimum_nonzero_variance
preconditions: Banking API is reachable at BASE_URL
System minimum reportable variance threshold is known (e.g. 0.01)
Internal ledger balance is seeded to differ from correspondent bank by exactly 0.01
EOD cron job is authorized via CRON_API_KEY header
actions: Seed ledger with exactly 0.01 variance vs correspondent bank via <seed_variance_ledger_fixture>
POST /cron/reconcile with valid CRON_API_KEY header
Poll report store until report status is COMPLETE
Retrieve incidents for the run ID
expected: Exactly one incident is opened (threshold crossed)
Incident severity matches the lowest severity band in the decision table
trace: R-FIN-050: boundary behaviour at exact min threshold must be tested
R-FIN-050: non-zero variance shall open an incident
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests
from tests.fixtures import seed_variance_ledger_fixture, get_report, get_incidents
from tests.config import BASE_URL, CRON_HEADERS, SEVERITY_TABLE, MIN_VARIANCE

def test_reconcile_boundary_minimum_nonzero_variance(seed_variance_ledger_fixture):
    assert MIN_VARIANCE == 0.01, "Precondition: min threshold must be 0.01"
    run_id = seed_variance_ledger_fixture(variance=MIN_VARIANCE)["run_id"]

    resp = requests.post(f"{BASE_URL}/cron/reconcile", headers=CRON_HEADERS,
                         json={"run_id": run_id})
    assert resp.status_code == 200

    report = get_report(run_id, timeout=30)
    assert report["variance"] == pytest.approx(MIN_VARIANCE)

    incidents = get_incidents(run_id)
    assert len(incidents) == 1
    assert incidents[0]["severity"] == SEVERITY_TABLE.resolve(MIN_VARIANCE)

tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests
from tests.fixtures import seed_variance_ledger_fixture, get_report, get_incidents
from tests.config import BASE_URL, CRON_HEADERS, SEVERITY_TABLE, MAX_VARIANCE

def test_reconcile_boundary_maximum_variance_highest_severity(seed_variance_ledger_fixture):
    run_id = seed_variance_ledger_fixture(variance=MAX_VARIANCE)["run_id"]

    resp = requests.post(f"{BASE_URL}/cron/reconcile", headers=CRON_HEADERS,
                         json={"run_id": run_id})
    assert resp.status_code == 200

    report = get_report(run_id, timeout=30)
    assert report["variance"] == pytest.approx(MAX_VARIANCE)

    incidents = get_incidents(run_id)
    assert len(incidents) == 1
    assert incidents[0]["severity"] == "CRITICAL"
    assert incidents[0]["severity"] == SEVERITY_TABLE.resolve(MAX_VARIANCE)

tests.name: test_reconcile_unauthorized_trigger_rejected
preconditions: Banking API is reachable at BASE_URL
No valid CRON_API_KEY is supplied in the request
actions: POST /cron/reconcile with a missing or invalid Authorization header
Inspect HTTP response code and body
expected: No report is created in the report store
trace: R-FIN-050: EOD trigger must be authenticated (system job actor)
R-FIN-050: report stored only on valid trigger
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests
from tests.fixtures import get_report_by_token, get_incidents_by_token
from tests.config import BASE_URL
import uuid

def test_reconcile_unauthorized_trigger_rejected():
    bad_headers = {"Authorization": "Bearer INVALID_TOKEN_XYZ"}
    fake_run_id = str(uuid.uuid4())

    resp = requests.post(f"{BASE_URL}/cron/reconcile", headers=bad_headers,
                         json={"run_id": fake_run_id})
    assert resp.status_code in (401, 403), (
        f"Expected 401/403 for unauthorized trigger, got {resp.status_code}"
    )

    report = get_report_by_token(fake_run_id, must_exist=False)
    assert report is None, "No report should be stored for unauthorized trigger"

    incidents = get_incidents_by_token(fake_run_id)
    assert len(incidents) == 0, "No incidents should be opened for unauthorized trigger"

tests.name: test_reconcile_state_transition_open_to_resolved
preconditions: Banking API is reachable at BASE_URL
A previous reconciliation run has created an OPEN incident
Subsequent ledger correction brings variance to zero
EOD cron job is authorized via CRON_API_KEY header
actions: Seed run_1 with non-zero variance; trigger reconcile; verify OPEN incident via <seed_variance_ledger_fixture>
Correct the ledger to zero variance via <seed_balanced_ledger_fixture> for run_2
POST /cron/reconcile again with run_2
Retrieve incident status for run_1 after run_2 completes
expected: run_1 incident transitions from OPEN to RESOLVED after zero-variance run
No new incident created for run_2
trace: R-FIN-050: non-zero variance shall open an incident
R-FIN-050: system state must transition correctly once variance is resolved
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests
from tests.fixtures import (
    seed_variance_ledger_fixture, seed_balanced_ledger_fixture,
    get_report, get_incidents, get_incident_by_id
)
from tests.config import BASE_URL, CRON_HEADERS

def test_reconcile_state_transition_open_to_resolved(
    seed_variance_ledger_fixture, seed_balanced_ledger_fixture
):
    run_1 = seed_variance_ledger_fixture(variance=200.00)["run_id"]
    requests.post(f"{BASE_URL}/cron/reconcile", headers=CRON_HEADERS,
                  json={"run_id": run_1})
    incidents_1 = get_incidents(run_1)
    assert len(incidents_1) == 1
    incident_id = incidents_1[0]["id"]
    assert incidents_1[0]["status"] == "OPEN"

    run_2 = seed_balanced_ledger_fixture["run_id"]
    resp2 = requests.post(f"{BASE_URL}/cron/reconcile", headers=CRON_HEADERS,
                          json={"run_id": run_2})
    assert resp2.status_code == 200

    report_2 = get_report(run_2, timeout=30)
    assert report_2["variance"] == 0
    assert len(get_incidents(run_2)) == 0

    resolved = get_incident_by_id(incident_id)
    assert resolved["status"] == "RESOLVED"
